candidate_definition_hints.text: pg_task - job scheduler for PostgreSQL, Greenplum and Greengage: asynchronous background execution of SQL commands at user-defined time
PostgreSQL, Greenplum and Greengage job scheduler `pg_task` allows to execute any sql command at any specific time at background asynchronously
